chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.D-2039 of 2013 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For orders on statement 24.01.2018. Mr. Shabeer Hussain Memon, Advocate, holding brief on behalf of Mr. Muhammad Sachal R. Awan, Advocate for petitioner. Mr. Muhammad Ismail Bhutto, A.A.G. This statement has been filed on 04.12.2017 by Mr. Muhammad Sachal R. Awan, Advocate for petitioner, stating therein that he does not want to press this petition under the instructions of his client, therefore, this petition stands disposed of as not pressed alongwith pending applications(s) if any. JUDGE JUDGE Ali Haider
